name: Cola Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together sugar and flour.
2. Add marshmallows to the dry ingredients and mix well.
3. In a saucepan, combine butter, oil, cocoa, and Coca cola. Heat until boiling.
4. Pour the hot mixture over the sugar mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Add buttermilk, vanilla extract, eggs, and baking soda. Mix until smooth.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 13 x 2 inch baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
9. To make frosting: In a saucepan, combine butter, cocoa, and Coca cola. Heat until boiling.
10. Pour over powdered sugar and stir until smooth. Add vanilla extract and chopped pecans. Stir well.
11. Spread frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
12. Cut into squares. Each serving contains approximately 672 calories, 5g protein, 95mg carbs, 33g fat, and 221mg sodium. Fat makes up about 4% of total calories.
